description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named main that triggers on push events. Use a matrix strategy to run a build job on both ubuntu-latest and windows-latest operating systems with Python versions 3.8 and 3.9. For each matrix combination, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, install Poetry, check dependencies with make doctor, restore the .venv cache if available, install dependencies with make install, check code with make check, test code with make test, and run a demo with make demo.
